title: Admin Dashboard UI

tasks.title: Admin Layout with Navigation
tasks.description: Main admin layout with sidebar navigation
acceptance_criteria: Sidebar with menu items: Dashboard, Products, Orders, Categories
Header with user info and logout

tasks.title: Dashboard Overview Page
acceptance_criteria: Stat cards: Total Sales, Orders Today, Pending Orders, Low Stock Items
Quick actions: Add Product, View Orders

tasks.title: Product List Page
acceptance_criteria: Table with columns: Image, Name, Price, Stock, Category, Status, Actions

tasks.title: Product Create/Edit Form
tasks.description: Form for adding or editing products
acceptance_criteria: Form fields: Name (EN/AZ/RU), Description, Price, Original Price, Stock

tasks.title: Category Management Page
acceptance_criteria: List all categories in tree view

tasks.title: Orders List Page
acceptance_criteria: Table with columns: Order #, Date, Customer, Total, Status, Actions
Search by order number or email

tasks.title: Order Detail Page
tasks.description: Full order view with status management
acceptance_criteria: Order info: Number, Date, Status, Customer, Email, Phone

dependencies: All Alpha and Beta admin APIs must be available
notes: Use existing shadcn/ui components (Table, Card, Dialog, Form, etc.)
Follow existing admin authentication pattern from Sprint 1.1
All data fetching via TanStack Query
Responsive design for tablet/desktop admin use
